I've completed the repository-wide rename task. The following changes were applied:

| Old Name | New Name | Files Changed |

| `NodeeFileStorage` | `WorkerAuthStorage` | 4 locations across 3 files (`internal/daemon/worker/worker.go`, `internal/daemon/worker/listeners.go`, `internal/daemon/worker/controller_connection.go`, `internal/cmd/commands/dev/dev.go`) |
| `NodeeCurrentKeyId` | `WorkerAuthCurrentKeyId` | 4 locations across 3 files (same as above plus `internal/cmd/commands/server/server.go`) |
| `NodeeRegistrationRequest` | `WorkerAuthRegistrationRequest` | 4 locations across 3 files (same as above plus `internal/cmd/commands/server/server.go`, removing one duplicate) |
| `nodeeSplitListener` | `workerAuthSplitListener` | 11 locations across 2 files (`internal/daemon/worker/worker.go`, `internal/daemon/worker/listeners.go`) |
